input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for the project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to first understand the project structure, find what testing frameworks and coverage tools are available, then run coverage and analyze the results.

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run tests with code coverage collection

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run tests with code coverage collection

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with coverage collection using coverlet, then analyze the results.

The project uses:
- .NET 9.0
- MSTest framework
- coverlet.collector for coverage

I'll run `dotnet test` with coverage collection enabled, using Cobertura format so I can parse the results.

arguments.description: Run tests with code coverage collection

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5134870b0ab34684a5b752aced65cafe && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./TestResults -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=cobertura 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage collection", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run tests with code coverage collection
